programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: During a Parents' Weekend at school, Eddie and Joy discover that Allison has become a ceramics major and is planning to leave school for a semester in Vermont with her teaching assistant.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: When Joy heads off to spend spring break in Florida with Allison, Eddie relishes the prospect of spending a week at home alone - at least until the cable TV goes out.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: The Starks are relieved when the Woodcocks start spending time with the Cofelds - until they realize that they miss them.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: Joy has second thoughts after agreeing to trade responsibility for the family finances for Eddie's job as the family's cappuccino maven.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: Eddie is stunned after Joy sets up his old college roommate, Webby, with her friend Denise.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: When their worries over the fact that he might be dying lead Joy to want to have sex more often, Eddie doesn't want to break the spell after learning that he isn't really sick.
